title: Presentations---Ian Goodfellow
text:
# Presentations

Note: to open the Keynote files, you will need to install the Computer Modern fonts.
I use these fonts so that the main text of the slide matches the font of
equations copied from TeX.
If you do not install these fonts, the Keynote files will open but will
have incorrect fonts so the layout of the text will be wrong.

## Invited Talks

### Adversarial Examples and Adversarial Training

* "The Case for Dynamic Defenses Against Adversarial Examples". ICLR SafeML Workshop, 2019.  [slides(pdf) ]  [slides(key) ]
* "Introduction to Adversarial Examples". KIBM Symposium on AI and the Brain.  [slides(.key) ]

* "Defense against the Dark Arts: An overview of adversarial example security research and future research directions". IEEE Deep Learning Security Workshop 2018.  [slides+notes(pdf) ]  [slides(pdf) ]  [slides(key) ]

* "Exploring vision-based security challenges for AI-driven scene understanding," joint presentation with Nicolas Papernot at [AutoSens](http://auto-sens.com/) , September 2016, in Brussels. Access to the slides and video may be purchased at the conference website. They will be freely available after six months.

## Contributed Talks

* "Qualitatively characterizing neural network optimization problems" at ICLR 2015. [[slides(pdf)]](optimization_condensed.pdf)
* "Multi-digit Number Recognition from Street View Imagery using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks"
  with Yaroslav Bulatov and Julian Ibarz at ICLR 2014. [[youtube]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vGPI_JvLoN0)
* "Maxout Networks" at ICML 2013. [[video]](http://techtalks.tv/talks/maxout-networks/58135/)
* "Joint Training Deep Boltzmann Machines for Classification" at ICLR 2013 (workshop track). [[video]](http://techtalks.tv/talks/joint-training-deep-boltzmann-machines-for-classification/58098/)

## Miscellaneous

* I've made several [presentations for the Deep Learning textbook](http://www.deeplearningbook.org/lecture_slides.html) , and presented some of them at a [study group](http://www.meetup.com/Deep-Learning-Textbook-Study-Group/) for the book.
* PhD thesis defense. [[youtube]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ckoD_bE8Bhs) [[slides]](defense.pdf)
